title: brassica rapa var. cylindrica
intro: Brassica rapa var. cylindrica, also known as Chinese kale or Gai Lan, is a variety of the Brassica rapa plant, a cool-season crop belonging to the Brassicaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brassica rapa var. cylindrica include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce the risk of heart disease, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, soups, and stir-fries, and can also be consumed raw in salads or as a garnish.
